description: Advanced Narrative Prompt Generator for Image Analysis and Design Creation

elon_musk.title: Elon Musk: Social Security Scandals & Legal Battles
elon_musk.prompt:
Create a striking, professional typography design featuring the text 'Elon Musk: Social Security Scandals & Legal Battles' 
            as the central focal point. The composition should exude authority and gravitas while maintaining a modern, tech-inspired aesthetic.
            
            TYPOGRAPHY SPECIFICATIONS:
            • Primary text: Use a bold, futuristic sans-serif font with clean lines and subtle geometric modifications
            • Font weight: Heavy (700-900) with tight letter spacing for maximum impact
            • Text treatment: Apply a subtle metallic gradient from deep navy blue to silver
            • Secondary elements: Smaller legal terminology in a contrasting serif font for hierarchy
            
            COLOR PALETTE:
            • Primary: Deep navy blue (#1a237e) for main text
            • Secondary: Metallic silver (#c0c0c0) for accents and highlights
            • Background: Dark gradient from charcoal (#424242) to deep space blue (#263238)
            • Accent: Electric blue (#2196f3) for subtle highlights and legal symbols
            
            VISUAL ELEMENTS:
            • Circuit patterns: Subtle, geometric circuit board patterns integrated into the background
            • Legal symbols: Discreet gavel and scales of justice icons in the corners
            • Document textures: Faint, translucent Social Security card and legal document overlays
            • Grid system: Subtle geometric grid lines suggesting both technology and legal structure
            
            COMPOSITION & LAYOUT:
            • Centered composition with the main text as the dominant element
            • Layered background with multiple depth levels
            • Strategic use of negative space to create breathing room
            • Asymmetric balance with legal symbols positioned for visual interest
            
            LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
            • Soft, professional lighting with subtle rim lighting on text
            • Ambient glow from circuit elements
            • Dramatic contrast between light and dark areas
            • Overall mood: Authoritative, serious, yet modern and tech-forward

mojo_dojo.title: Mojo Dojo Casa House - Barbie Core Aesthetic
mojo_dojo.prompt:
Design a vibrant, energetic typography piece featuring 'Mojo Dojo Casa House' in bold, playful lettering that captures 
            the essence of Ken's dream house from the Barbie movie. The design should perfectly balance masculine and feminine aesthetics 
            with a retro-futuristic 80s vibe.
            
            TYPOGRAPHY SPECIFICATIONS:
            • Primary text: Bold, rounded sans-serif with 80s-inspired curves and neon outlines
            • Font treatment: Gradient fill from hot pink to electric blue with metallic gold accents
            • Text effects: Subtle drop shadows and inner glow for depth
            • Secondary text: Smaller decorative elements in a complementary script font
            
            COLOR PALETTE:
            • Primary: Hot pink (#e91e63) for main text
            • Secondary: Electric blue (#03a9f4) for contrast elements
            • Accent: Metallic gold (#ffd700) for highlights and decorative elements
            • Background: Gradient from neon purple (#9c27b0) to deep pink (#ad1457)
            
            VISUAL ELEMENTS:
            • Geometric patterns: 80s-inspired geometric shapes and lines
            • Disco elements: Subtle disco ball reflections and light beams
            • Palm trees: Stylized palm tree silhouettes in the background
            • Neon lighting: Glowing neon tube effects around text
            • Retro patterns: Chevron and zigzag patterns in complementary colors
            
            COMPOSITION & LAYOUT:
            • Centered composition with dynamic, energetic placement
            • Layered elements creating depth and visual interest
            • Balanced asymmetry with decorative elements
            • Maximum visual impact with bold, confident positioning
            
            LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
            • Bright, energetic lighting with neon glow effects
            • Vibrant, high-contrast color scheme
            • Playful, optimistic mood
            • Retro-futuristic atmosphere with 80s nostalgia

for_ai_art_generation: Use the detailed prompts as starting points for AI art generation
Modify color palettes and elements based on your specific needs
Test different variations to find the most effective designs
Combine elements from multiple prompts for unique creations
